---
name: Bug report
about: Something doesn't work the way the docs say it should
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
---

**FoamSync version** (from the licence badge or the activation dialog):
**Windows version** (10 or 11; build if known):
**Controller / firmware** (if relevant):

## What you did
A short, ordered list of the steps you took.

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## What you expected
What the docs (or your intuition) said should happen.

## What actually happened
What you observed instead. Quote the exact log message if there is one.

## Diagnostic bundle
Export from **SETUP → DIAGNOSTICS → REPORTS → Export Support Bundle**
and attach the resulting file. This is the single most useful thing
you can send.

## Additional context
Screenshots, photos of the machine, or a short video if it's easier
to show than to describe.
